paper_title: Worse than Random? An Embarrassingly Simple Probing Evaluation of Large Multimodal Models in Medical VQA

methodology.evaluation_approach: Simple probing evaluation method with hallucination pairs

results.key_finding: LMMs show significant vulnerability when faced with adversarial questioning
results.performance_drop: Average decrease of 42% across tested models
results.performance_comparison: Advanced models performed worse than random guessing with adversarial pairs
results.evaluation_insight: Models may appear accurate on standard evaluation but fail on adversarial evaluation

figures.figure_1: Accuracy of four LMMs on specialized medical diagnosis questions with and without adversarial pairs
figures.figure_2: Example illustrating potential for misleading accuracy in existing evaluations

title: Worse than Random? An Embarrassingly Simple Probing Evaluation of Large Multimodal Models in Medical VQA
